questions.question: Which prophet warned Paul about what would happen to him in Jerusalem by binding his own hands and feet?
Why was Paul seized in the temple by the crowd?
options: They thought he had brought Greeks into the temple
He refused to make an offering
questions.answer: They thought he had brought Greeks into the temple

questions.question: Paul agreed to participate in a purification ritual at the temple to show he still respected the Law.
Paul said, 'I am ready not only to be bound, but also to _____ at Jerusalem for the name of the Lord Jesus.'
The Roman commander ordered Paul to be brought into the _____ to protect him from the violent crowd.
